Meaning.En: A historic city in North Yorkshire, England, known for its medieval architecture and Roman and Viking heritage.
Meaning.Example: Many tourists visit York to see the famous York Minster and the preserved Viking-era streets of Jorvik.

Situation.Vi: Tham quan di tích lịch sử ở thành phố York, Anh.
Situation.En: Exploring historical sites in York, England.

Meaning.En: A small breed of dog originating from Yorkshire, England, known for its long, silky blue-and-tan coat.
Meaning.Example: My friend’s York is very energetic and loves to bark at strangers.

Situation.Vi: Chăm sóc hoặc dắt chó York đi dạo.
Situation.En: Caring for or walking a Yorkshire Terrier.
